title: taraxacum zineralum
intro: Taraxacum zineralum, also known as dandelion, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Taraxacum zineralum include supporting liver function, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in digestion, as well as being a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Taraxacum zineralum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a food ingredient, particularly in salads and as a coffee substitute.
